description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2-development branch. The workflow should have read-all permissions and a single job called build that runs on a matrix of ROS distributions (rolling, iron, humble, foxy) and operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, ubuntu-20.04). For each job, set up a ROS2 workspace, check copyright and line endings, build ROS2, install dependencies, build the RealSense SDK and ROS2 wrapper from source, and run tests.
